title: Noah Lucas homepage v032 expanded Postmates scope
changeSummary: Expands the Postmates card to cover customer-service organization and stack rebuild, automation, Zendesk integration, and internal product-operations infrastructure.
Adds the first non-domestic market launch and Apple/Walmart same-day delivery integrations alongside the developer-platform and B2B product growth from 0 to $12M ARR.
Preserves the v031 resume-aligned copy, rounded glass pane, mobile logo strip, images, and responsive layout.
Leaves the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local HTTP server plus in-app browser at 1280x720; DOM and console checks for the expanded Postmates card.
checks: Postmates body and impact drawer expose the requested operating scope without horizontal overflow.
Rounded glass pane and mobile employer proof strip remain unchanged from v031.
No browser console warnings or errors were observed.
